Name: -1_art_wife_great_music
Representative_Docs: ['Someone like Lord Kenneth Clark was a good example to me.  He loved art and wanted to show it to the masses.  At the same time he explained and did not try to bastardise the art that he spoke of.  He even enlightened me and made me want to learn more about art.', "Yes. They always have a strong sense of aesthetic concepts and utilizes layering of different elements  in order to create a unique sense of taste. Their taste is different from everyone else's but has a lot in common with experienced artists and craftspeople. They do not tend to like popular things, but rather what appeals to them personally. Other people usually like their aesthetic choices.", "Yes, I know several people who I think have great taste. My grandmothers come to mind, they were ladies to the T but also real women who exuded grace under extreme pressure, made it look so easy to manage home and hearth, raise several children successfully, I mean nobody wants to be the parent of a Jeffrey Dahmer right? The matriarchs of my family instilled in me the belief that I could be anything I wanted and how to be a lady while achieving my goals. I never heard a swear word from either of them, they didn't gossip, run the streets, stir up trouble or have their business aired around town. They were very much the type of women who were gracious, humble, grateful, intelligent, witty and just had this quality about them that is the essence of great taste."]

Name: 0_clothes_look_friend_dresses
Representative_Docs: ['This person has good taste because they can dress in style all the time.  Their clothes match and fits nicely.  Their shoes and watch are a good complement to their clothes.', 'I think RR has good taste because she always dresses well with nicely coordinated accessories.  The clothes she picks  are very fits well and the colors patterns seem to blend well.  She never dresses slovenly or wears clothes whose colors and patterns clash.', 'A friend of mine has very good taste in clothes. They wear things that fit their body and style, and they look great.']

Name: 1_audience_way_piece_subjective
Representative_Docs: ["The canonical example of 'good taste' is Steve Jobs, the conductor behind Apple's flow into mainstream culture with devices such as the iPod, iPhone, and iPad. The tastefulness lies in the refinement of the product, the willingness to sacrifice obvious utility with a discoverability hidden in simplicity. Elegance in refinement, a sacrifice to 'taste' which the market acknowledged as successful.", 'Myself, and as conceited as it sounds, I truly believe I have good taste compared to most people. I say myself because I really have a an amazingly broad spectrum of things I like compared to most people. Even if there\'s something I dislike, I can find a way to appreciate it, I break down everything into deeper parts and go over it, so I really know what my taste is and why it\'s that way. I can relate to everyone, while being so different from everyone, and I think "good taste" features a wide variety of unrelated things you\'d like.', "Really anyone who puts time into wanting to create something that speaks to and is generally perceived as 'good' by members of a specific audience. Taste is largely subjective, but also dependent upon the audience. So whereas one audience might perceive a MAGA hat as cheap and distasteful, another audience might look at it as extremely tasteful. If we're looking for a specific person here, I would say that Steve Jobs had good taste. He was able to create things that appealed to a lot of people such that they would use them, find them convenient, and pay money for them. I would call that tasteful in addition to successful."]

Name: 2_music_movies_shows_enjoy
Representative_Docs: ['I think my father fits this description. He generally likes quality tv shows, movies and animation. He likes good music and is not afraid to expand and watch/listen to new genres.', "A friend of mine who doesn't like listening to metal music but who understands the value in it. He also understands the difficulty in performing and how there is a type of music for everyone. This is an example where I would completely disagree with their opinion, but that doesn't necessarily mean they have bad taste. They also enjoy other forms of music that I also enjoy.", 'Right now I can only think of my son. Of all the people I can recall, he is the only one with a taste similar to mine. Since I believe I have "good taste" I raised my son to enjoy the same types of movies and books that I enjoy. Of course, I didn\'t force it upon him, and at first, he found many of the movies boring, but gradually, over time he began to appreciate the type of art I enjoy.']

Name: 3_friend_best_lot_friends
Representative_Docs: ['I think majority of my close friends have good taste, but especially my best friend. This is because we like the same things, therefore her taste is very similar to my taste.', "My best friend has very good taste, he really puts a lot of effort into making sure that things fit together in an appropriate way and cater to his strengths and weaknesses appropriately. He also does a lot of research online to see other people's tastes and tries to incorporate those things into his own stylistic choices.", "I think my best friend has good taste in art and food. They pay close attention to the subtle details that the artists put into their work and can appreciate the level of depth and details that the artist had. Also in food, while fine dining is not in itself good taste, I think my friend can appreciate unique flavor combinations that most people just hate while they haven't tried them first."]

Name: 4_obama_michelle_based_ive
Representative_Docs: ['If we are speaking of a famous person, Michelle Obama comes to mind. She is classy and wants to set a good example to other women. She is highly respected because of what she represents.', 'Michelle Obama has good taste.  Both in character and in works of art, books and poetry, and general preferences.  She has an appreciation for beauty and grace and for recognizing the efforts of others in their pursuits an work.  She recognizes art for what it represpents and aspirations it may bring forth', 'I think that former President Barack Obama has good taste.  I suspect this due to how he carries himself and based on how he seems to go out of his way to be respectful towards others.  I also got a glimpse of his musical preferences based on the many specials that he hosted at the White House. He definitely has good musical taste.']
